scripts.build:win:dev: npm run build:vite:dev && tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.build:win-arm:dev: npm run build:vite:dev && tauri build --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.build:mac:dev: npm run build:vite:dev && tauri build --target aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.build:linux:dev: npm run build:vite:dev && tauri build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.build:snap:dev: cross-env VITE_PLATFORM=SNAP npm run build:vite:dev && npx tauri build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --bundles deb && cd src-tauri && snapcraft clean && snapcraft pack
scripts.build:win:prd: npm run build:vite && tauri build --target x86_64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.build:win-arm:prd: npm run build:vite && tauri build --target aarch64-pc-windows-msvc
scripts.build:mac:prd: npm run build:vite && tauri build --target aarch64-apple-darwin
scripts.build:linux:prd: npm run build:vite && tauri build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu
scripts.build:snap:prd: cross-env VITE_PLATFORM=SNAP npm run build:vite && npx tauri build --target x86_64-unknown-linux-gnu --bundles deb && cd src-tauri && snapcraft clean && snapcraft pack
